offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, manual data entry causes reporting delays. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry and reporting.
problem: Manual data entry from claim forms leads to errors and delays in reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for brokers
try_it: Let users try data extraction from claim forms on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
